message:
fix(command,runtime): fix lua_eval test indentation and refactor runtime match arms

lua_eval: fix misaligned closing brace and test indentation for
empty_while_loop_hits_iteration_limit; remove trailing whitespace in
string.rep guard.

runtime: refactor CLIENT LIST/GETNAME/SETNAME and MEMORY USAGE match
arms for consistent formatting and simplify response construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
